{
  "executive_summary": "A lightweight ML serving architecture for real-time delivery time prediction, optimized for a 4-person team. The design separates the hot path (feature lookup → model inference → response) from the cold path (training pipeline, feature engineering, model validation). A pre-computed feature store eliminates real-time feature computation to hit the 100ms P99 target. Model versioning with blue-green deployment enables safe weekly retraining with instant rollback.
